headline: Trump Tariff 💸💥 Refunds DROP but Karens 😩🚫 Get Zilch!
text:
Trump 🍊👨‍💼 'Liberation Day' 🚀🆓 tariff MASSACRE 💣📉 finally UNLOADING $160BN 🤑💰 FAT STACKS back to biz SIMPS 🤝🏭 via CAPE PORTAL 🌐🚪 – biggest payday ORGY 💦📈 in HISTORY ‼️! SCOTUS ⚖️🔨 SMACKED DOWN those IEEPA duties 📜🚫 in Feb, CIT judge Eaton ✍️😤 declaring ALL 330K importers 🏢📦 'ENTITLED TO THE BAG' 🛡️💸 plus JUICY INTEREST 🍑📈! 56K+ chads 💪 already SLAMMED apps for $127BN 😱🚀 when portal went LIVE Monday – CBP flexing 'EFFICIENT PROCESS' 🛠️💨 with LUMP SUM DUMP 💥🍆 in 60-90 days, no item-by-item simp grind 😩🔄!

Small biz coalition 'We Pay the Tariffs' 😤💸 spilling tea ☕: 'MIXED BAG 🫠' – some SEAMLESS 🚀 others ERROR HELL 😈💻! Dan Anthony 🧔📢 salty AF about Trump 2.0 NEW TARIFFS 👹📈 looming to WIPE OUT gains like a bad acid trip 🌀😵. Bunch Bikes 🚲⚡ CEO Aaron Powell 💼 prepped $120K refund 🤑 but 'CAUTIOUSLY OPTI' 🤏 – stashing as BUFFER 🛡️ vs July/Aug levy BOMBS 💣🌪️, no hiring or YOLO spends 💸🎰 'til BANK POPS 💥🏦! Elec bike supply chain CHOKED 😩🌍 by tariffs, now ghosting investments 👻📉.

But KARENS & NORMIE SHOPPERS 😭🛒? STRAIGHT CUCKED 🚫🍆 – no direct bag, prices JACKED 🔺💸 indirectly, now SUEING BIG 🧑‍⚖️⚡! Class actions SLAPPING EssilorLuxottica 🕶️😎 (Ray-Bans), FedEx 📦🚚, Costco 🛒🐂 – Vachris vows 'LOWER PRICES' 📉💰 but lamp granny Sue Johnson 🪔👵 RAGE: 'SUPPLIER DOUBLED COSTS 🤑➡️😡, ZERO HOPE THEY PASS IT ON' 🤷‍♀️🚫! Importers jacked prices but NOT FULL OFFSET 📏😩, plus DEBT PITS 🕳️💳 & LOST SALES GHOSTS 👻📉 – complicated AF 🌀🤯!

Trump crew NO CAP 🚫🧢: USTR Jamieson Greer 📢 urges 'WINDFALL' 💨🤑 to WORKER BONUSES 👷‍♂️💸, Treasury Bessent 🏦😏 'MERICA WON'T SEE SHIT' 😂👻 – consumers LEFT HANGING like Epstein's pals 🛌😈! Biz windfall ORGY 💦👯‍♂️ but plebs? SIMPING FOR CRUMBS 🍞😩 while corps THRUST refunds up their own ASSets 🍑📈! Wall Street watching if this 'refund RAVE' 🎉💰 turns into tariff TWERK 📉🍑 or MAGA MOONSHOT 🚀🍊 – HOLD MY WALL 🧱😤!
